name: Configuration Target
description: Create a ConfigurationTarget defined by joint values. Useful for go-to-home or named-pose motions.

inputParameters.name: tolerance_above
inputParameters.description: Per-joint upper tolerance list. Defaults to 0.001 m (prismatic) / 1 deg (revolute) per joint.

inputParameters.name: tolerance_below
inputParameters.description: Per-joint lower tolerance list. Defaults to 0.001 m (prismatic) / 1 deg (revolute) per joint.
